title: Bionano Q1 2026 revenue rises 4% to $6.7M
text: Bionano Genomics reported Q1 2026 financial results on May 13, 2026, with revenue of $6.7 million, up 4% year over year. Consumables revenue increased 20% to $3.9 million, and flow cell sales rose 17% to 8,178 units. The company guided Q2 2026 revenue to $7.5–$7.8 million and full-year 2026 revenue to $30–$33 million. The company highlighted new CPT reimbursement developments for optical genome mapping. Earlier in the year, CMS increased the Category I CPT code 81195 payment by 47%, from $1,263.53 to $1,853.22, effective January 1, 2026. In May 2026, Al Luderer, Ph.D., chairman of Bionano's Board of Directors, was appointed interim president and CEO. The company is approaching a significant balance sheet milestone with expected retirement of its secured convertible debt, and recently filed a $400,000,000 shelf.
